title: 會聊天的人｜神回覆修練
flow_note: 1-10 完成送 2 遊客金幣；11-20 先跟讀達 35% 再解鎖選題；完成 11-20 再送 2 遊客金幣。

questions.title: 英文被稱讚

choices.en: My English is good because my Chinese is worse.
choices.zh: 我的英文好，是因為我的中文更糟。

questions.correct_reply_en: Humor makes people remember you.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 幽默的人，不一定最厲害，但最容易被記住。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Too normal. Try a funnier answer.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 太普通了。神回覆要有一點意外感。

questions.title: 看起來年輕
questions.en: You look younger than your age.
questions.zh: 你看起來比實際年齡年輕。

choices.en: Please say that again. My ears love compliments.
choices.zh: 請再說一次，我的耳朵愛聽稱讚。

questions.correct_reply_en: A compliment can become a small performance.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 別人丟來稱讚，你可以接成一場小表演。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Safe, but not memorable.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 安全，但沒有記憶點。

questions.title: 被說聰明
questions.correct_reply_en: A little confidence is funny. Too much is trouble.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 自信一分是幽默，自信十分就變自戀。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This answer does not create a spark.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這回答不錯，但沒有火花。

questions.title: 外套很好看

choices.en: The jacket is happy you noticed it.
choices.zh: 這件外套很高興你注意到它。

questions.correct_reply_en: Give life to the object, and the sentence becomes fun.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 把東西講活，普通句子就變有趣。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Correct, but too flat.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 沒錯，但太平了。

questions.title: 看起來很開心

choices.en: My bills haven't found me today.
choices.zh: 我的帳單今天還沒找到我。

questions.correct_reply_en: Real life pain often makes the best joke.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 生活的痛點，常常就是最好的笑點。
questions.wrong_reply_en: It answers the question, but it does not entertain.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 有回答到，但不夠好玩。

questions.title: 笑容很好看
questions.correct_reply_en: Return the compliment softly. That keeps the conversation alive.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 稱讚要接住，再輕輕回傳，對話才會活。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This is polite, but not playful.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 有禮貌，但不夠俏皮。

questions.title: 你很有趣

choices.en: Good. Being handsome alone is too much pressure.
choices.zh: 太好了，光靠帥真的壓力太大。

questions.correct_reply_en: Self-jokes are safer than showing off.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 自嘲比自誇安全，也更容易讓人笑。
questions.wrong_reply_en: The answer is too plain for this challenge.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這題要有脫口秀感，不能太老實。

questions.title: 你很善良

choices.en: I haven't met enough annoying people yet.
choices.zh: 我只是還沒遇到夠多煩人的人。

questions.correct_reply_en: A playful twist makes kindness less boring.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 善良也可以不無聊，轉一下就有味道。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Nice, but too expected.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 不錯，但太容易猜到。

questions.title: 你很冷靜

choices.en: Panic is expensive. I can't afford it.
choices.zh: 慌張太貴了，我負擔不起。

questions.correct_reply_en: Funny truth is powerful.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 好笑的真話，最有力量。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This answer is understandable, but weak.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 聽得懂，但力道不夠。

questions.title: 你很努力

choices.zh: 我的帳單是最好的激勵師。

questions.correct_reply_en: Everyone understands bills. Shared pain becomes shared laughter.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 帳單人人懂，共同的痛苦就能變成共同的笑點。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Too direct. Add humor.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 太直接了，少了幽默轉折。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：看起來強壯
questions.target_reply_en: I carry all my problems every day.
questions.target_reply_zh: 我每天都扛著我的問題。

choices.en: I carry all my problems every day.
choices.zh: 我每天都扛著我的問題。

questions.correct_reply_en: A heavy life becomes a light joke.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 把沉重的生活講輕，這就是幽默。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Try the answer with a twist.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 要選有轉折的那句。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：有天分
questions.target_reply_en: Years of mistakes finally paid off.
questions.target_reply_zh: 多年的錯誤終於有回報了。

choices.en: Years of mistakes finally paid off.
choices.zh: 多年的錯誤終於有回報了。

questions.correct_reply_en: Mistakes are tuition. Wisdom is the diploma.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 錯誤是學費，智慧是畢業證書。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This one needs self-humor.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這題要選帶自嘲的神回覆。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：品味很好
questions.target_reply_zh: 我是從昂貴的錯誤中學來的。

choices.zh: 我是從昂貴的錯誤中學來的。

questions.correct_reply_en: A little pain makes the joke real.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 帶一點痛，笑點才真。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This is too ordinary.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這句太普通，沒有神回覆感。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：看起來自信
questions.target_reply_en: Nobody saw me panic this morning.
questions.target_reply_zh: 沒人看到我今天早上慌張的樣子。

choices.en: Nobody saw me panic this morning.
choices.zh: 沒人看到我今天早上慌張的樣子。

questions.correct_reply_en: Behind every calm face, there may be a small storm.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 每張淡定的臉後面，可能都有一場小風暴。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Choose the answer that reveals a funny secret.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 選那句揭露小秘密的，才有趣。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：你很幸運
questions.target_reply_en: Luck follows people who refuse to quit.
questions.target_reply_zh: 運氣會跟著不放棄的人走。

choices.en: Luck follows people who refuse to quit.
choices.zh: 運氣會跟著不放棄的人走。

questions.correct_reply_en: This one is not only funny. It also has power.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 這句不只好聽，還有力量。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This question needs a stronger line.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這題要選比較有力量的句子。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：很有條理
questions.target_reply_en: My memory gave up years ago.
questions.target_reply_zh: 我的記憶力很多年前就放棄我了。

choices.en: My memory gave up years ago.
choices.zh: 我的記憶力很多年前就放棄我了。

questions.correct_reply_en: Turn a weakness into a joke, and people relax.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 把弱點講成笑點，別人就放鬆了。
questions.wrong_reply_en: It is correct, but not funny enough.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 意思沒錯，但笑點不夠。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：總知道怎麼說
questions.en: You always know what to say.
questions.target_reply_en: Only after saying many wrong things.
questions.target_reply_zh: 那是因為我以前說錯太多次。

choices.en: Only after saying many wrong things.
choices.zh: 那是因為我以前說錯太多次。

questions.correct_reply_en: Experience is just failure with better clothes.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 經驗，就是穿得比較好看的失敗。
questions.wrong_reply_en: The best answer shows the lesson behind the skill.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 最佳答案要說出能力背後的代價。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：很有耐心
questions.target_reply_zh: 這都是 Wi-Fi 訓練出來的。

choices.zh: 這都是 Wi-Fi 訓練出來的。

questions.correct_reply_en: Everyone has suffered from slow Wi-Fi. That is why it works.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 大家都被慢 Wi-Fi 折磨過，所以這句有共鳴。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Pick the answer with common pain.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 選那句有共同痛點的。

questions.title: 跟讀解鎖：看起來成功
questions.target_reply_en: My failures are just less visible.
questions.target_reply_zh: 只是我的失敗比較不明顯。

choices.en: My failures are just less visible.
choices.zh: 只是我的失敗比較不明顯。

questions.correct_reply_en: A humble joke is better than a proud answer.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 謙虛的笑話，比驕傲的回答更耐聽。
questions.wrong_reply_en: This answer misses the stand-up feeling.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 這句少了脫口秀味道。

questions.title: 你太厲害了
questions.target_reply_en: Don't tell everyone. I'm trying to stay humble.
questions.target_reply_zh: 不要告訴大家，我正在努力保持謙虛。

choices.en: Don't tell everyone. I'm trying to stay humble.
choices.zh: 不要告訴大家，我正在努力保持謙虛。

questions.correct_reply_en: The best comeback accepts praise and laughs at the same time.
questions.correct_reply_zh: 最好的神回覆，是接住稱讚，又順手製造笑點。
questions.wrong_reply_en: Too plain. End with style.
questions.wrong_reply_zh: 太平淡了，最後一題要收得漂亮。

ending_reply_en: Ordinary people learn English. Charming people learn how to reply.
ending_reply_zh: 普通人學英文，會聊天的人學回話。會回話的人，走到哪裡都比較受歡迎。
